mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dt, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS daily_revenue FROM reservation WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY dt ASC

SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS published_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ON_SALE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_sale_count FROM performance WHERE approval_status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'REJECTED') GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_count DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(confirmed_at, '%Y-%m') AS year_month, COUNT(*) AS confirmed_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue, AVG(total_amount) AS avg_amount FROM reservation WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED' AND confirmed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(confirmed_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY year_month ASC

SELECT HOUR(created_at) AS hour_of_day, COUNT(*) AS reservation_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed_count FROM reservation WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY HOUR(created_at) ORDER BY hour_of_day ASC

SELECT pr.promoter_id, pr.company_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.performance_id) AS performance_count, COUNT(r.reservation_id) AS reservation_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN r.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_revenue, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN r.total_amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.1), 0) AS platform_fee FROM promoter pr LEFT JOIN performance p ON p.promoter_id = pr.promoter_id LEFT JOIN schedule sc ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id LEFT JOIN reservation r ON r.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id WHERE pr.approval_status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY pr.promoter_id, pr.company_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.performance_id, p.title, p.category, pr.company_name AS promoter_name, p.venue_name, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.schedule_id) AS schedule_count, COUNT(r.reservation_id) AS reservation_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN r.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_revenue FROM performance p LEFT JOIN promoter pr ON p.promoter_id = pr.promoter_id LEFT JOIN schedule sc ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id LEFT JOIN reservation r ON r.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id WHERE p.approval_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PUBLISHED') GROUP BY p.performance_id, p.title, p.category, pr.company_name, p.venue_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.grade, COUNT(si.inventory_id) AS total_seats, SUM(CASE WHEN si.status = 'RESERVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reserved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN si.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN si.status = 'RESERVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS sell_rate FROM seat_inventory si JOIN seat s ON si.seat_id = s.seat_id WHERE si.hold_type = 'PUBLIC' GROUP BY s.grade ORDER BY FIELD(s.grade, 'VIP', 'R', 'S', 'A', 'STANDING')

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE role = 'USER' AND status = 'ACTIVE') AS active_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE role = 'USER' AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS new_users_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM performance WHERE status = 'ON_SALE') AS on_sale_performances, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS today_reservations, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM reservation WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED' AND DATE(confirmed_at) = CURDATE()) AS today_revenue, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM reservation WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED' AND YEAR(confirmed_at) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(confirmed_at) = MONTH(NOW())) AS month_revenue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_inventory WHERE status = 'HELD' AND held_until > NOW()) AS active_holds, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE status = 'PENDING') AS pending_reservations FROM DUAL
